ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the economic data */,
  "quarter" TEXT /* Quarter of the economic data (e.g., Q1, Q2) */,
  "real_gdi" REAL /* Real Gross Domestic Income (GDI) in millions of dollars */,
  "real_gdp" REAL /* Real Gross Domestic Product (GDP) in millions of dollars */,
  "nominal_gdp" REAL /* Nominal Gross Domestic Product (GDP) in millions of dollars */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "currency_unit" TEXT /* Currency unit of the economic data */,
  "seasonally_adjusted" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is seasonally adjusted */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., Federal Reserve, Bureau of Economic Analysis) */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the data source's website */,
  "data_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data source information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser used */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of user IDs with whom the report is shared */,
  "report_file" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data to monitor */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., threshold, trend) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert is currently active */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was last triggered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic data entry */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the person who made the change */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Detailed description of the changes made */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES economic_data ("data_id")
)
